title: DSS 2025 Panel: Financial Security Risks of DeFi
description:
As DeFi scales, so do the risks. From market volatility to smart contract exposure, managing financial risk has become one of the biggest challenges in decentralized finance. Who should be responsible for risk management? Curators or Protocol Governance?

Panelists:
- Sebastian Derivaux, Co-founder, Steakhouse Financial
- monetsupply, Head of Strategy, Spark
- Matt Cole, Co-Founder, Allez Labs
- Yaron Velner, Co-Founder, B.Protocol
- Rémi Foult, Co-Founder, 9Summits

Moderator
- Ayham, Cofounder, Silo

About DSS
DSS brings together top minds in blockchain, auditing, and security — from white-hat hackers and protocol developers to academic researchers and industry leaders. The goal? To tackle the most pressing issues in DeFi security head-on — from smart contract exploits and cross-chain vulnerabilities to governance threats and beyond.

https://defisecuritysummit.org
track: DeFi Security Summit 2025 - Auditorium Stage - Day 1
